task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the OpenMRS Administration interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenMRS Administration dashboard or home screen, indicating successful authentication with the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Concept Dictionary or View/Edit Concepts section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Concept Dictionary' or 'View/Edit Concepts' search interface in the OpenMRS web application.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the 'Electrolytes Panel' concept for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the concept editing page where the concept name is explicitly shown as 'Electrolytes Panel'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent added 'Serum Magnesium' as a set member.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Serum Magnesium' typed into the 'Add Set Member' search box or actively listed in the 'Set Members' section of the 'Electrolytes Panel' concept form.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the updated concept set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success notification (e.g., 'Concept saved successfully') or the saved view of the 'Electrolytes Panel' concept clearly displaying 'Serum Magnesium' in its list of Set Members.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser window displaying the OpenMRS interface. There should be no terminal windows executing curl commands or scripts to interact with the OpenMRS API.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual OpenMRS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard OpenMRS UI elements, navigation bars, and styling. The agent should not be typing the expected outcome into a text editor or a disconnected document.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open and being used to manually inject 'Serum Magnesium' into the DOM or fake a success message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying the concept set 'Electrolytes Panel' by adding the concept 'Serum Magnesium' as a member. Both concepts exist in the system. Verify that 'Serum Magnesium' is specifically added to the 'Set Members' list of the 'Electrolytes Panel' concept.
